dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires identification of candle color (black/white) and short candle patterns, which are not available as direct indicators. Approximated using close vs prev_close to determine bearish/bullish candles. Entry occurs on the day following the signal candle. Position relative to sma_50 (50-trading-day MA) acts as breakout confirmation. Exit uses MA crossover as reversal signal per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires identification of candle color (black/white) and short candle patterns, which are not available as direct indicators. Approximated using close vs prev_close to determine bearish/bullish candles. Entry occurs on the day following the signal candle. Position relative to sma_50 (50-trading-day MA) acts as breakout confirmation. Exit uses MA crossover as reversal signal per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.

source_rule_text: Short candle reversal pattern: In uptrend, wait for black candle to signal reversal the next day; in downtrend, trade after white candle appears the next day. Position candle relative to moving average and intraday range affects performance.
